_publications._publicationTitle: Spatial Gene-Expression Profiling Unveils Immuno-oncogenic Programs of NF1-Associated Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor Progression.

_contextSnippet: observed a significant reduction in cell viability with both drugs in human MPNST and murine MPNST precursor ecell lines, with minimal effect on the viability of human wild-type and NF1 mutant Schwann cells
details: Significant reduction in cell viability in human MPNST and murine MPNST precursor cell lines, with minimal effect on human wild-type and NF1 mutant Schwann cells
